---
---

## Slide 1 - Single pipe table

| A | B |
|---|---|
| 1 | 2 |
| 3 | 4 |

## Slide 2 - Multiple pipe tables

| X | Y |
|---|---|
| 1 | 2 |

| P | Q |
|---|---|
| 9 | 8 |

## Slide 3 - Pipe table alongside paragraph

A paragraph next to a table.

| Name | Value |
|------|-------|
| foo  | 1     |
| bar  | 2     |

## Slide 4 - Grid table

+---+---+
| A | B |
+===+===+
| 1 | 2 |
+---+---+

## Slide 5 - HTML table

<table>
<tr><th>A</th><th>B</th></tr>
<tr><td>1</td><td>2</td></tr>
</table>

## Slide 6 - Captioned pipe table

| A | B |
|---|---|
| 1 | 2 |

: My caption {#tbl-cap}

## Slide 7 - List table

::: {.list-table}
  - - A
    - B
  - - 1
    - 2
:::
